mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu ( id, parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, path, component, permission_code, icon, sort_no, visible, status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{menuType}, #{path}, #{component}, #{permissionCode}, #{icon}, #{sortNo}, #{visible}, #{status}, #{operatorId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{operatorId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_type = #{menuType}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, permission_code = #{permissionCode}, icon = #{icon}, sort_no = #{sortNo}, visible = #{visible}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{operatorId}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE role_menu FROM sys_role_menu role_menu JOIN sys_role role ON role.id = role_menu.role_id AND role.deleted = 0 JOIN sys_menu menu ON menu.id = role_menu.menu_id AND menu.deleted = 0 WHERE role.role_code = #{roleCode} AND menu.path IN
#{path}
